title: cyathea buruensis
intro: Cyathea buruensis, also known as the Buru tree fern, is a species of fern native to Indonesia. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Cyathea buruensis is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, but its use should be approached with caution as more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
